privileged_info_summary: The task.json file contains no metadata field. The task operates on real image data sourced from Unsplash (photo-1557804506-669a67965ba0, 800x600 JPEG; fallback photo-1486312338219-ce68d2c6f44d, 800x532 JPEG). The task applies GIMP's Decor > Round Corners filter to create transparent rounded corners, verified by checking alpha channel transparency in corner regions. No synthesized data is used.
